name: Zucchini Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C). Grease a 13 x 9-inch baking pan.
2. Sprinkle 2-3 teaspoons of flour over the bottom and sides of the pan, gently tapping to coat evenly.
3. Invert the pan and tap out any excess flour.
4. Shred enough zucchinis to yield 2 cups shredded zucchini; set aside.
5. Beat together margarine, oil, and sugar in a large bowl until well blended.
6. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Blend in the flavorings.
7. In a separate medium bowl, combine dry ingredients (flour, cocoa, baking soda, salt).
8. Alternate adding the dry mixture and buttermilk to the margarine mixture, beating well after each addition.
9. Stir in the shredded zucchini.
10. Pour batter into the prepared pan and sprinkle with nuts and chocolate chips.
11. Bake for 55 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow to cool on a wire rack.
12. Cut into squares. Frost with your favorite chocolate frosting, if desired.
